latestOutput.content:
Built src/prototypes/main.folder/SiloDashboard/index.jsx (215 lines, Tailwind only, no Box/sx/CSS modules).

Structure:
- Outer min-h-screen bg-neutral-950 text-neutral-200 flex font-mono
- Left w-56 sidebar: mint logo, SILO/maze-war labels, JUMP TO CMD+K pill, Docs link, MAZE-WAR section header, nav items (Projects/Images/Utilization[active text-emerald-400 bg-neutral-900]/Silo Access) using ICONS map
- Right column: h-12 header (Utilization breadcrumb + Silo/user pills), main p-8 gap-6 with GraphIcon page title, 3 summary cards (SummaryCard with stacked emerald/violet bar from provisioned/quota), toolbar (SyncIcon + All projects select / Last hour select + date range), then ChartPanel slots.

Data wiring (use these paths):
- useFlowData('summary') -> {cpu,memory,storage} each {label,percent,provisioned,quota,unit}
- useFlowData('user'), useFlowData('workspace'), useFlowData('nav'), useFlowData('timeRange')
- All have ?? fallbacks; SummaryCard guards null data.

For Charts (already integrated in this version): SiloChart accepts { data: [{t,v}], unit }. Wrap inside ChartPanel(title, data, unit). useObject('metrics','cpu'|'memory'|'storage').

Icons used (all verified in primer-octicons.json): FileIcon, ImageIcon, ZapIcon, KeyIcon, GraphIcon, SyncIcon, CalendarIcon, PersonIcon, InfoIcon.
